title: rhododendron citrinum
intro: Rhododendron citrinum, also known as the Citron Azalea, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the rhododendron family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and shiny green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rhododendron citrinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Rhododendron citrinum can be used in herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
